gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles and gestures widely with both hands, inviting everyone to explore addition together
a person holds up their right hand, displaying all five fingers clearly while encouraging the class to do the same
a tutor steps forward, bending slightly at the knees, and gathers counting blocks with both hands
a person demonstrates setting down five counters in a row and then adds five more, excitedly counting aloud
a tutor walks to the side of a number line, pointing enthusiastically at the start as they explain adding
a person gestures forward with their arm, showing a clear motion as if moving along the number line to find the answer
a tutor raises both hands in celebration, smiling broadly while proclaiming that five plus five equals ten
a person claps their hands together and steps backward, encouragingly inviting students to share more fun addition methods
